mission: Continuously maintain the console directory as a product-shaped surface and preserve local design history for skills-as-console productization decisions.

current_product_target.product_positioning: console directory maintained as the product surface for the governed skill stack
current_product_target.current_phase: continuous console productization around the Skills directory

hard_boundaries: the editable source of truth stays inside octopus-os-agent-console/Skills rather than ~/.codex/skills
the Skills directory should be maintained as a coherent console product surface instead of a loose scratch area
public product README and docs stay English-only
end-user wizard and TUI surfaces stay bilingual English/Chinese
internal skill core and governance docs may stay Chinese-first
product-facing docs and product tools must not be pushed into the codex installation directory
console productization decisions should prefer governed skill roots, registry, and runtime contracts over ad-hoc notes
skill roots still evolve here first and then flow to ~/.codex/skills through the governed sync path
the codex installation directory is a deployment surface, not the authoring surface for console productization

local_history_contract.log_update_rule: append a log entry whenever a new console productization decision, directory boundary change, or skill-management convergence is made
local_history_contract.migration_rule: if the governed runtime log does not exist yet, seed it from references/runtime/ITERATION_LOG.md and continue writing only to the runtime root afterward
local_history_contract.future_switch_rule: once the console product form is stable enough, the main release-facing narrative may move back to GitHub while this local log becomes a narrower continuity aid

runtime_observability.runtime_log_policy: active console-productization logs must append only under the governed runtime root; the repo copy is a read-only migration seed
runtime_observability.result_policy: this skill currently emits machine-readable stdout and runtime log writes only; future file artifacts must accept an explicit target path or default under the governed result root
